meta.title: 天气
meta.description: Basic weather vocabulary and expressions in Chinese: describing conditions and temperature.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 기초 날씨 어휘와 표현: 날씨 묘사와 기온.

explanation.en: 「今天天气怎么样」means "How is the weather today?"
explanation.ko: 「今天天气怎么样」는 '오늘 날씨가 어때요?'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「今天天气怎么样」是什么意思？(What does this phrase mean?)

explanation.en: 「下雨」(xià yǔ) means "to rain".

questions.prompt: 「下雨」是什么意思？(What does 下雨 mean?)

explanation.en: 「晴天」(qíngtiān) means "sunny/clear day".

questions.prompt: 「晴天」是什么意思？(What does 晴天 mean?)

explanation.en: 「冷」means "cold" and 「热」means "hot", describing temperature.

questions.prompt: 「冷」和「热」的区别是什么？

explanation.en: 「刮风」(guā fēng) means "windy/the wind is blowing".

questions.prompt: 「刮风」是什么意思？(What does 刮风 mean?)

explanation.en: 「怎么样」asks "how is (something)", commonly used with 天气 to ask about the weather.
explanation.ko: 「怎么样」는 '어때요'라는 뜻으로 날씨를 물을 때 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 今天天气___？(How is the weather today?)

explanation.en: 「下雨」is the fixed verb-object phrase for "to rain".

questions.prompt: 外面在___雨，请带伞。(It's raining outside, please bring an umbrella.)

explanation.en: 「冷」means "cold", prompting the need for thicker clothing.

questions.prompt: 今天很___，我要穿厚一点的衣服。(It's very cold today, I need to wear thicker clothes.)

explanation.en: 「热」means "hot", typical of summer weather.

questions.prompt: 夏天很___，我喜欢游泳。(Summer is very hot, I like swimming.)

explanation.en: 「晴天」means "sunny day".

questions.prompt: 今天是___天，阳光很好。(Today is sunny, the sunlight is great.)

explanation.en: 「刮风」is the fixed phrase for "windy".

questions.prompt: 外面在___风，很大声。(It's windy outside, quite loud.)

explanation.en: 「下雪」(xià xuě) means "to snow".

questions.prompt: 冬天会___雪，很漂亮。(It snows in winter, it's very beautiful.)

explanation.en: 「很好」means "very good", describing pleasant weather.
explanation.ko: 「很好」는 '매우 좋다'라는 뜻으로 쾌적한 날씨를 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 今天天气___，不冷也不热。(The weather today is nice, neither cold nor hot.)

explanation.en: 「凉快」(liángkuai) means "cool/refreshing", typical of autumn weather.

questions.prompt: 秋天天气很___，很舒服。(Autumn weather is cool, very comfortable.)

explanation.en: 「阴」(yīn) means "overcast/cloudy".

questions.prompt: 今天有点___，看不到太阳。(It's a bit cloudy today, can't see the sun.)

explanation.en: 「变化很大」means "changes a lot", describing spring's variable weather.
explanation.ko: 「变化很大」는 '변화가 크다'라는 뜻으로 봄 날씨의 변덕스러움을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 春天天气___，有时候冷，有时候暖和。(Spring weather changes a lot, sometimes cold, sometimes warm.)

explanation.en: 「下雨」means "to rain"; carrying an umbrella suggests possible rain.
explanation.ko: 「下雨」는 '비가 오다'라는 뜻으로 우산을 챙기는 이유가 된다.

questions.prompt: 明天可能会___，你要带伞。(It might rain tomorrow, you should bring an umbrella.)

explanation.en: 「摄氏度」(shèshìdù) means "degrees Celsius", used for temperature.

questions.prompt: 今天气温三十___度，很热。(Today's temperature is thirty degrees, very hot.)

explanation.en: 「冷」means "cold", describing northern winters.

questions.prompt: 北方的冬天特别___，经常下雪。(Winters in the north are especially cold, it often snows.)

explanation.en: 「最低」(zuì dī) means "lowest", paired with 最高 (highest) for temperature range.
explanation.ko: 「最低」(zuì dī)는 '최저'를 뜻하며 '最高(최고)'와 짝을 이룬다.

questions.prompt: 今天最高气温是二十五度，最___是十五度。(Today's high is 25 degrees, the low is 15 degrees.)

explanation.en: 「很」cannot be placed before the question word 「怎么样」; the correct sentence is simply 今天天气怎么样？
explanation.ko: 「很」은 의문사 '怎么样' 앞에 올 수 없으며 올바른 문장은 '今天天气怎么样？'이다.

questions.prompt: 今天天气很怎么样。(How is the weather today?) — find the error

explanation.en: 「下雨」is a fixed verb-object compound where 下 (verb) must precede 雨 (object); 雨下 reverses the correct order.
explanation.ko: 「下雨」는 동사 '下'가 목적어 '雨' 앞에 와야 하는 고정 동목 구조이며 '雨下'는 어순이 틀렸다.

questions.prompt: 外面雨下，请带伞。(It's raining outside, please bring an umbrella.) — find the error

explanation.en: The subject 天气 (weather) should come before the predicate 很热 (very hot): 天气很热 (not 很热天气).
explanation.ko: 주어 '天气(날씨)'는 술어 '很热(매우 덥다)' 앞에 와야 하므로 '天气很热'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 今天很热天气。(The weather is very hot today.) — find the error

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 今天天气怎么样？("How is the weather today?")
explanation.ko: 문장은 '今天天气怎么样？' (오늘 날씨가 어때요?)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 今天__________？(How is the weather today?)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 外面在下雨，请带伞 ("It's raining outside, please bring an umbrella").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '外面在下雨，请带伞' (밖에 비가 오고 있어요, 우산을 챙기세요)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 外面__________，请带伞。(It's raining outside, please bring an umbrella.)
